title: Research Harness Finding (MIF-backed)
description: A research finding is a MIF v1.0 memory unit (schemas/mif/mif.schema.json) extended with two harness-local concerns that MIF core does not carry (SPEC §8b): a non-empty citation set (citation-integrity is a core gate, SPEC §6c/§6d) and an adversarial-falsification verification record under extensions.harness. The base $ref points at the REAL vendored MIF schema; this file only adds, never overrides.

citations.description: MIF Level 3 citations; at least one is required so every finding is traceable to a primary source (citation-integrity gate).

dimension.description: The config-declared research dimension this finding belongs to (domain-general; not a fixed market-research set). SPEC §4a.

verification.description: Harness-local falsification trait (SPEC §8b): the ordinal verdict from the single adversarial gate.

gathered_under.description: Provenance (SPEC §11): the single goal version whose research first produced this finding. Immutable; distinct from membership.

goal_versions.description: Derived membership mirror (SPEC §11): the set of goal versions this finding is in scope for. NOT hand-authored — projected from each version's goals/goal-<hash>.members.json by build-index.sh; re-derivable, the per-version members file is the authority.
